title: transport: ws:// in production silently sends unencrypted traffic with no warning
description: open_authenticated_ws() accepts ws:// URLs without warning. The TLS Connector is only applied for wss:// URLs; for ws:// it is a no-op and all traffic goes in cleartext. The accept_invalid_certs flag is warned on, but an operator setting relay_url=ws://... in production gets no warning. This is a footgun: the relay may be accessible over ws:// for local testing but that setting leaks message content. At minimum, warn at the tracing level when a non-localhost ws:// URL is used.
